headline: How The Story Is Shifting For Automatic Data Processing (ADP) After Analyst Target Resets
summary: Automatic Data Processing’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$276.71 to US$272.00, a roughly 1.7% adjustment that reflects slightly softer assumptions in the latest model. This change sits alongside a split analyst backdrop, with some firms cutting targets more aggressively while others are initiating with a more constructive tone, all circling around how current expectations stack up against the reset. As you read on, you will see how these evolving calls fit together and what...
